Evotec
Home Examples Gallery Docs Releases
Install

ChartForgeX examples

Rendered visuals with the C# that produced them.

Browse selected ChartForgeX outputs, switch between SVG, PNG, and HTML when available, and keep the visual result close to the source pattern that created it.

Generated showcase

One chart model, multiple useful outputs.

Each selected example keeps the rendered visual, export formats, and C# pattern close together so the result can be reviewed visually and reused quickly.

SVG PNG HTML C#
Open Domain security checks (ReportDark)
domain-security-dark.svg dnssec.SaveSvg("domain-security-dark.svg");
Smooth area

Domain security checks (ReportDark)

Stacked smooth areas with line series, target line, and weekend band for reporting security-check trends.

HTML Domain security checks (ReportDark) SVG Domain security checks (ReportDark) PNG Domain security checks (ReportDark)
domain-security-dark.cs
var dnssec = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Domain Security Checks")
    .WithSubtitle("Dependency-free SVG, HTML and PNG chart rendering")
    .WithXAxis("Run")
    .WithYAxis("Checks")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportDark())
    .WithSize(1180, 640)
    .WithTransparentBackground(true)
    .WithXLabels("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun", "Next")
    .AddSmoothArea("Passed", Points(820, 940, 980, 1040, 1120, 1180, 1230, 1260))
    .AddSmoothLine("Warnings", Points(120, 138, 132, 110, 98, 86, 72, 68), ChartColor.FromRgb(251, 191, 36))
    .AddSmoothLine("Failed", Points(22, 30, 28, 21, 18, 15, 13, 10), ChartColor.FromRgb(248, 113, 113))
    .AddHorizontalLine(100, "warning target", ChartColor.FromRgb(251, 191, 36))
    .AddVerticalBand(6, 7, "weekend", ChartColor.FromRgb(96, 165, 250), 0.10);

SaveChart(dnssec, "domain-security-dark");
Open Certificate transparency volume
ct-volume-light.svg bars.SaveSvg("ct-volume-light.svg");
Bar + line combo

Certificate transparency volume

Bar series with a smooth line on a secondary y-axis, plus a horizontal band. Real ReportLight theme output, no JavaScript runtime needed.

HTML Certificate transparency volume SVG Certificate transparency volume PNG Certificate transparency volume
ct-volume-light.cs
var bars = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Certificate Transparency Volume")
    .WithSubtitle("Bar-line combo with a secondary y-axis and no JavaScript runtime")
    .WithXAxis("Day")
    .WithYAxis("Certificates")
    .WithSecondaryYAxis("Pass rate", value => value.ToString("0") + "%")
    .WithSecondaryYAxisBounds(0, 100)
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportLight())
    .WithSize(1180, 640)
    .WithXLabels("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun")
    .AddBarLineCombo(
        "Certificates",
        Points(4200, 5300, 6100, 5900, 7200, 8100, 7900),
        "Pass rate",
        Points(87, 89, 91, 90, 93, 95, 94),
        ChartColor.FromRgb(37, 99, 235),
        ChartColor.FromRgb(14, 165, 233),
        smoothLine: true,
        lineAxis: ChartAxisSide.Secondary)
    .AddHorizontalBand(7000, 8500, "high volume", ChartColor.FromRgb(16, 185, 129), 0.12);

SaveChart(bars, "ct-volume-light");
Open Domain control composition
domain-control-horizontal-light.svg horizontal.SaveSvg("domain-control-horizontal-light.svg");
Stacked horizontal bar

Domain control composition

Stacked horizontal bars with running totals, data labels, and percent formatting. Reads naturally for long category names.

HTML Domain control composition SVG Domain control composition PNG Domain control composition
domain-control-horizontal-light.cs
var horizontal = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Domain Control Composition")
    .WithSubtitle("Stacked horizontal bars keep long category labels readable")
    .WithXAxis("Coverage")
    .WithYAxis("Control")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportLight())
    .WithSize(920, 560)
    .WithStackedHorizontalBars()
    .WithStackTotals()
    .WithDataLabels()
    .WithValueFormatter(value => value.ToString("0") + "%")
    .WithXLabels("SPF alignment", "DMARC policy enforcement", "DNSSEC coverage",
                 "Certificate transparency monitoring", "MTA-STS deployment")
    .AddHorizontalBar("Complete", Points(72, 64, 52, 78, 44), ChartColor.FromRgb(16, 185, 129))
    .AddHorizontalBar("Partial",  Points(24, 24, 22, 14, 19), ChartColor.FromRgb(245, 158, 11))
    .AddHorizontalBar("Missing",  Points(4, 12, 26, 8, 37),   ChartColor.FromRgb(239, 68, 68));

SaveChart(horizontal, "domain-control-horizontal-light");
Open Control coverage matrix
control-coverage-heatmap-dark.svg heatmap.SaveSvg("control-coverage-heatmap-dark.svg");
Heatmap

Control coverage matrix

Heatmap rows for comparing domain groups across security controls. Built-in semantic scale colour-codes the values automatically.

HTML Control coverage matrix SVG Control coverage matrix PNG Control coverage matrix
control-coverage-heatmap-dark.cs
var heatmap = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Control Coverage Matrix")
    .WithSubtitle("Heatmap rows for comparing domain groups across security controls")
    .WithXAxis("Control")
    .WithYAxis("Domain group")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportDark())
    .WithSize(980, 560)
    .WithLegend(false)
    .WithDataLabels()
    .WithHeatmapScale(ChartHeatmapScale.Semantic)
    .WithValueFormatter(value => value.ToString("0") + "%")
    .WithXLabels("SPF", "DMARC", "DNSSEC", "MTA-STS", "TLS-RPT", "CT")
    .AddHeatmapRow("Primary domains",  Points(96, 88, 74, 63, 58, 92))
    .AddHeatmapRow("Parked domains",   Points(74, 62, 51, 42, 38, 66))
    .AddHeatmapRow("Regional domains", Points(82, 77, 68, 54, 49, 80))
    .AddHeatmapRow("Acquired domains", Points(58, 43, 36, 28, 25, 52));

SaveChart(heatmap, "control-coverage-heatmap-dark");
Open Security posture radar
security-posture-radar-dark.svg radar.SaveSvg("security-posture-radar-dark.svg");
Radar

Security posture radar

Radial comparison across major control areas. Two series — current vs target posture — with percentage formatting.

HTML Security posture radar SVG Security posture radar PNG Security posture radar
security-posture-radar-dark.cs
var radar = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Security Posture Radar")
    .WithSubtitle("Radial comparison across major domain control areas")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportDark())
    .WithSize(920, 560)
    .WithValueFormatter(value => value.ToString("0") + "%")
    .WithXLabels("Mail auth", "DNSSEC", "TLS", "CT", "Policy", "Monitoring")
    .AddRadar("Current posture", Points(92, 74, 88, 96, 81, 84), ChartColor.FromRgb(96, 165, 250))
    .AddRadar("Target posture",  Points(96, 90, 94, 98, 92, 90), ChartColor.FromRgb(52, 211, 153));

SaveChart(radar, "security-posture-radar-dark");
Open Control scorecards small-multiples
control-scorecards-grid.svg controlScorecardGrid.SaveSvg("control-scorecards-grid.svg");
Gauge · bullet · radial

Control scorecards small-multiples

ChartGrid composes a gauge, bullet rows, radar, and polar-area into a single static report grid with shared theming.

HTML Control scorecards small-multiples SVG Control scorecards small-multiples PNG Control scorecards small-multiples
control-scorecards-grid.cs
var controlScorecardGrid = ChartGrid.Create()
    .WithTitle("Control Scorecard Small Multiples")
    .WithSubtitle("Static report grid composed from existing dependency-free chart renderers")
    .WithColumns(2)
    .Add(gauge)
    .Add(bullet)
    .Add(radar)
    .Add(polarArea);

SaveGrid(controlScorecardGrid, "control-scorecards-grid");
Open Remediation impact waterfall
remediation-impact-waterfall-dark.svg waterfall.SaveSvg("remediation-impact-waterfall-dark.svg");
Waterfall

Remediation impact waterfall

Waterfall deltas show how findings changed during a cleanup cycle — opened, resolved, suppressed, accepted, regressed.

HTML Remediation impact waterfall SVG Remediation impact waterfall PNG Remediation impact waterfall
remediation-impact-waterfall-dark.cs
var waterfall = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Remediation Impact")
    .WithSubtitle("Waterfall deltas show how findings changed during a cleanup cycle")
    .WithXAxis("Change")
    .WithYAxis("Open findings")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportDark())
    .WithSize(920, 540)
    .WithDataLabels()
    .WithXLabels("Opened", "Resolved", "Suppressed", "Accepted", "Regressed")
    .AddWaterfall("Finding delta", Points(24, -68, -18, -9, 11), ChartColor.FromRgb(52, 211, 153));

SaveChart(waterfall, "remediation-impact-waterfall-dark");
Open Findings composition treemap
findings-composition-treemap-light.svg findingsTreemap.SaveSvg("findings-composition-treemap-light.svg");
Treemap

Findings composition treemap

Treemap tiles show proportional contribution by category. Values render as percentages with a single value-formatter.

HTML Findings composition treemap SVG Findings composition treemap PNG Findings composition treemap
findings-composition-treemap-light.cs
var findingsTreemap = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Findings Composition")
    .WithSubtitle("Treemap tiles show proportional contribution by category")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportLight())
    .WithSize(920, 560)
    .WithValueFormatter(value => value.ToString("0") + "%")
    .AddTreemap("Finding share", new[] {
        new ChartTreemapItem("Authentication", 34),
        new ChartTreemapItem("Certificate lifecycle", 24),
        new ChartTreemapItem("DNS hygiene", 18),
        new ChartTreemapItem("Policy drift", 14),
        new ChartTreemapItem("Monitoring gaps", 10)
    });

SaveChart(findingsTreemap, "findings-composition-treemap-light");
Open Finding flow Sankey
finding-flow-sankey-light.svg findingFlow.SaveSvg("finding-flow-sankey-light.svg");
Sankey

Finding flow Sankey

Weighted paths from discovery through remediation outcomes. Ideal for quarterly retros and audit walkthroughs.

HTML Finding flow Sankey SVG Finding flow Sankey PNG Finding flow Sankey
finding-flow-sankey-light.cs
var findingFlow = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Finding Flow Sankey")
    .WithSubtitle("Weighted paths from discovery through remediation outcomes")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportLight())
    .WithSize(1040, 600)
    .WithDataLabels()
    .AddSankey("Findings", new[] {
        new ChartSankeyLink("Discovered", "Validated", 72),
        new ChartSankeyLink("Discovered", "Accepted risk", 18),
        new ChartSankeyLink("Validated", "Owner remediation", 48),
        new ChartSankeyLink("Validated", "Monitoring", 24),
        new ChartSankeyLink("Owner remediation", "Closed", 34),
        new ChartSankeyLink("Owner remediation", "Retesting", 14)
    });

SaveChart(findingFlow, "finding-flow-sankey-light");
Open Domain remediation Gantt
domain-remediation-gantt-light.svg gantt.SaveSvg("domain-remediation-gantt-light.svg");
Gantt

Domain remediation Gantt

Progress, task dependencies, milestones, and a current-schedule marker — all native to ChartForgeX, no extra libraries.

HTML Domain remediation Gantt SVG Domain remediation Gantt PNG Domain remediation Gantt
domain-remediation-gantt-light.cs
var gantt = Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Domain Remediation Gantt")
    .WithSubtitle("Progress, task dependencies, milestones, and current schedule marker")
    .WithXAxis("Schedule")
    .WithYAxis("Workstream")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportLight())
    .WithSize(1040, 600)
    .WithDataLabels()
    .WithGanttToday(new DateTime(2026, 2, 18))
    .AddGanttTask("Inventory scope",     new DateTime(2026, 1, 5),  new DateTime(2026, 1, 24), 0.90, color: ChartColor.FromRgb(37, 99, 235))
    .AddGanttTask("Owner remediation",   new DateTime(2026, 1, 20), new DateTime(2026, 2, 24), 0.62, dependsOn: 0, color: ChartColor.FromRgb(16, 185, 129))
    .AddGanttTask("Control retesting",   new DateTime(2026, 2, 18), new DateTime(2026, 3, 12), 0.28, dependsOn: 1, color: ChartColor.FromRgb(14, 165, 233))
    .AddGanttTask("Monitoring handoff",  new DateTime(2026, 3, 8),  new DateTime(2026, 3, 26), 0.12, dependsOn: 2, color: ChartColor.FromRgb(168, 85, 247))
    .AddGanttMilestone("Executive sign-off", new DateTime(2026, 3, 30), dependsOn: 3, color: ChartColor.FromRgb(245, 158, 11));

SaveChart(gantt, "domain-remediation-gantt-light");
Open Site topology with regions
site-topology.svg siteTopology.SaveSvg("site-topology.svg");
Topology

Site topology with regions

Regional site topology with hubs, branches, bridgeheads, route labels, and site-link health.

HTML Site topology with regions SVG Site topology with regions PNG Site topology with regions
site-topology.cs
TopologyChart.Create()
    .WithId("site-topology")
    .WithTitle("Site Topology")
    .WithSubtitle("Sample regional site topology with hubs, branches, bridgeheads, and site-link health.")
    .WithViewport(1200, 680, 28)
    .WithTheme(TopologyTheme.Light())
    .WithLegend(TopologyLegend.Default()
        .AddNodeKind("Hub site", TopologyNodeKind.Hub, symbol: "H")
        .AddNodeKind("Branch site", TopologyNodeKind.Branch, symbol: "B")
        .AddNodeKind("Bridgehead", TopologyNodeKind.Server, symbol: "BH")
        .AddEdgeKind("Site link", TopologyEdgeKind.Link))
    .AddGroup("AMER", "AMER", 60, 110, 310, 330, TopologyHealthStatus.Healthy, "47 sites")
    .AddGroup("EMEA", "EMEA", 435, 110, 330, 330, TopologyHealthStatus.Warning, "56 sites")
    .AddGroup("APAC", "APAC", 835, 110, 310, 330, TopologyHealthStatus.Critical, "39 sites")
    .AddNode("amer-hub", "AMER Hub", 160, 170, TopologyNodeKind.Hub,    TopologyHealthStatus.Healthy,  "AMER", "Hub site")
    .AddNode("lon-hub",  "EMEA Hub", 540, 170, TopologyNodeKind.Hub,    TopologyHealthStatus.Healthy,  "EMEA", "Hub site")
    .AddNode("apac-hub", "APAC Hub", 930, 170, TopologyNodeKind.Hub,    TopologyHealthStatus.Healthy,  "APAC", "Hub site")
    // … plus branches, bridgeheads, and edges with latency labels
    .AddEdge("amer-emea", "amer-hub", "lon-hub", "24 ms",  TopologyEdgeKind.Link, TopologyHealthStatus.Healthy)
    .AddEdge("emea-apac", "lon-hub",  "apac-hub", "82 ms", TopologyEdgeKind.Link, TopologyHealthStatus.Warning)
    .AddEdge("apac-anz",  "apac-hub", "anz",      "142 ms", TopologyEdgeKind.Link, TopologyHealthStatus.Critical);
Open Travel dotted world map
travel-dotted-map-dark.svg travelMap.SaveSvg("travel-dotted-map-dark.svg");
Map

Travel dotted world map

Dotted world layer with highlighted longitude and latitude points plus routes between them.

HTML Travel dotted world map SVG Travel dotted world map PNG Travel dotted world map
travel-dotted-map-dark.cs
Chart.Create()
    .WithTitle("Travel Map")
    .WithSubtitle("Dotted world layer with highlighted longitude and latitude points")
    .WithTheme(ChartTheme.ReportDark())
    .WithSize(980, 560)
    .WithLegend(false)
    .WithDataLabels()
    .AddDottedMap("Visited", new[] {
        new ChartMapPoint("Indonesia",     113.9213, -0.7893,  ChartColor.FromRgb(34, 197, 94)),
        new ChartMapPoint("Spain",          -3.7038, 40.4168, ChartColor.FromRgb(34, 197, 94)),
        new ChartMapPoint("United States", -98.5795, 39.8283, ChartColor.FromRgb(34, 197, 94)),
        new ChartMapPoint("Norway",          8.4689, 60.4720, ChartColor.FromRgb(59, 130, 246))
    })
    .AddMapRouteBetweenPoints("United States to Spain",  "United States", "Spain",     ChartColor.FromRgb(34, 197, 94))
    .AddMapRouteBetweenPoints("Spain to Indonesia",       "Spain",         "Indonesia", ChartColor.FromRgb(59, 130, 246));
Gallery Full generated catalog Browse the wider generated visual catalog by category. Manifest Promoted case JSON Machine-readable metadata for reusable project-site galleries. Schema Case manifest schema The shared contract behind promoted examples. Docs Implementation notes Use the documentation surface for build and publishing details.
Evotec

ChartForgeX is an Evotec open-source project. The hub page stays on evotec.xyz; this dedicated site hosts visual examples, docs, and reproducible cases.
